title: sideritis hirsuta var. tomentosa
intro: Sideritis hirsuta var. tomentosa, also known as the hairy mountain tea or woolly ironwort, is a plant species belonging to the genus Sideritis, native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving respiratory issues, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antiviral properties. Sideritis hirsuta var. tomentosa can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and has been traditionally used to aid in digestion, reduce stress, and promote overall well-being.
